campbell.title: Campbell City Council — April 21, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to discuss updating the city's business license tax rates for the upcoming fiscal year. Shannon Dragman from the Finance Department presented the proposed changes to the tax rates, and the council publicly discussed and voted on whether to approve the new ordinance.
keyTopics: Business license tax rate increases
Fiscal year budget adjustments
Finance Department presentation on tax changes
City Council vote on new ordinance

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — March 18, 2026
saratoga.summary: The City Council held a public hearing on March 18, 2026, where residents could voice their opinions on a proposed new rule or policy. After hearing public comments, the council moved forward by introducing an ordinance (a new city law) and skipped the usual first reading step to speed up the process. The ordinance will come back for final approval at the next council meeting.
keyTopics: Public hearing held for community input
New ordinance introduced and fast-tracked
Final vote scheduled for next regular council meeting
First reading waived to expedite approval process

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos City Council — April 21, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos City Council met on April 21, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, review the city's finances for February, and authorize the Town Manager to sign several contracts for construction services and professional agreements. The council covered routine administrative business and approved various agreements to move forward with town improvements and projects.
keyTopics: Approved February 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized construction contracts with multiple vendors
Approved three-year professional services agreement
Approved April meeting minutes from both public and closed sessions

san-jose.title: San José City Council — April 29, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting on April 29, 2026 to organize upcoming council sessions. They reviewed and made changes to the agendas for May 5 and May 12, including adding new items, setting specific times for certain discussions, and handling any legal notice requirements. The council also reviewed public records from the previous week.
keyTopics: Finalized May 5, 2026 council meeting agenda
Prepared draft agenda for May 12, 2026 meeting
Set specific time slots for agenda items to keep meetings on schedule
Reviewed public records from April 16-23, 2026

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — April 30, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met to approve previous meeting minutes and hear directly from residents during public comment time. The main focus was reviewing and deciding which neighborhood improvement projects would receive city funding for the 2026-27 fiscal year, along with updates on how often council members have been attending neighborhood meetings.
keyTopics: Neighborhood grant funding decisions for 2026-27
Public input and comments from residents
Council member attendance at neighborhood meetings
Meeting minutes approval

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — April 28, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a special study session on April 28, 2026, to interview candidates for various city boards and commissions. Residents were able to participate both in person and online to watch the interviews and provide public comment.
keyTopics: Board and Commission candidate interviews
In-person public comment opportunity
Online participation option for residents
Special study session format

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — April 30, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council held a meeting on April 30, 2026, primarily focused on reviewing and approving official records from two previous Economic Development Committee meetings. The council also opened the floor for public comments from residents who wanted to speak about issues within the committee's responsibilities.
keyTopics: Approval of January 29, 2026 Economic Development Committee meeting minutes
Approval of March 27, 2026 Economic Development Committee meeting minutes
Public comment period for residents on economic development matters

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — April 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: The Santa Clara City Council met to discuss allowing large promotional signs to be put on buildings near Levi's Stadium during the 2026 FIFA World Cup, and to approve a new employment contract with the city's firefighters union covering 2026-2029. One agenda item was withdrawn by staff before the meeting.
keyTopics: Temporary large signs permitted around Levi's Stadium for World Cup 2026 events
New 3-year contract negotiated with Santa Clara firefighters
Staff withdrew one item from the agenda

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — April 21, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on April 21, 2026 to discuss several important financial and development matters. The council reviewed and approved tax policies, approved the city's budget and development fees for the upcoming fiscal year, and heard an update on the county's plan to address homelessness in the community.
keyTopics: Tax Equity and Fiscal Responsibility Act reissuance
FY 2026-27 budget and development fees approval
Santa Clara County homelessness prevention plan
Updated city user fees and service charges

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — April 29, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The Palo Alto City Council met to discuss routine business items and heard a proposal to divide a 1-acre vacant lot on Old Trace Road into nine residential properties with nine new single-family homes and seven smaller accessory dwelling units. The council also handled internal matters like electing new leadership and setting the meeting schedule.
keyTopics: Subdivision proposal at 4103 Old Trace Road - 9 new homes plus 7 accessory units
Director's report and council meeting schedule
Election of new council chair and vice chair
Environmental review completed under state law (no additional study needed)
